message:
chore: bump version to 0.1.26 for release

Includes routing enhancements, graph/search/delete/show improvements,
sync engine fixes (incremental auto-flush, concurrent write safety),
config routing expansion, model enrichments, and clippy fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -271,7 +271,7 @@ checksum = "2af50177e190e07a26ab74f8b1efbfe2ef87da2116221318cb1c2e82baf7de06"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "beads_rust"
-version = "0.1.25"
+version = "0.1.26"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
  "assert_cmd",

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "beads_rust"
-version = "0.1.25"
+version = "0.1.26"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.88"
 description = "Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"
